name: Banana Bread Vegan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, wheat bran, wheat germ, turbinado sugar, baking powder, and sea salt.
4. Mix in the vanilla extract and mashed bananas until well incorporated.
5. Fold in the finely chopped apple.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 60-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the pan and cool on its side before slicing.
